issue: No issue found - demo already working correctly
root_cause: Demo uses imperative Three.js code for advanced clipping with multiple planes and InstancedMesh
fix: No fix needed - demo renders correctly with tetrahedron clipping planes on instanced boxes

fix_details.plane_calculation: planesFromMesh helper function creates planes from mesh vertices
fix_details.renderer_config: localClippingEnabled and shadowMap enabled with PCFSoftShadowMap

verification.visual_check: Demo shows rotating cube of red boxes being clipped by tetrahedron planes with shadows

additional_notes: Advanced clipping requires InstancedMesh and custom plane calculations which are handled correctly in imperative approach. Shadows and OrbitControls are properly configured.
